name: Marie Augustus' Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, 1/2 lb butter, both sugars, and salt in a large heavy pan.
2. Bring mixture to boil, cooking to "softball stage" using a candy thermometer.
3. Remove from heat and add the remaining 1/2 lb butter. Beat constantly.
4. When the mixture begins to thicken, add pecans and vanilla.
5. Quickly drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased surface or foil, leaving 2-3 inches between each piece as they will flatten out.
6. Remember that this candy is stirred constantly while being cooked and beaten constantly when removed from the heat.
